user.title: DEEBOT NEO 2
user.description: Log in with the same Ecovacs email you use in the Ecovacs Home app. This integration supports DEEBOT NEO 2.0 PLUS (class q287s6, stable) and DEEBOT NEO 2.0 (class eyfj07, experimental).

data_description.username: Enter the same email address you use in the Ecovacs Home app.

select_device.title: Select vacuum
select_device.description: Choose the DEEBOT NEO 2 vacuum to add.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Ecovacs. Check your network, account region, and try again.
error.no_supported_vacuums: No supported DEEBOT NEO 2 device found. Supported classes: q287s6 (NEO 2.0 PLUS) and eyfj07 (NEO 2.0).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
